series_metadata.series_description: The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) 1099 Listing is a PDF containing names of the 1099 recipients. The IRS forms 1099 and W-9 as well as returned 1099's & W-9's forms are digitally imaged and stored online.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: six (6) years on BWC Web, and ; Paper: paper copy 30 days post scanning ensure clear copy
